---
title: "Overview"
---

## Overview

Brief description of the project and its purpose. Replace this with actual project context.

::: {.callout-note}
# Note
This documentation follows Quarto Markdown (QMD) format for reproducible, multi-format publishing. 
:::

## Getting Started

### Prerequisites

- Tool / runtime version X
- Dependency Y

### Installation

```bash
# Clone the repository
git clone <repo-url>
cd project-name

# Install dependencies
npm install   # or pip install -r requirements.txt
```

## Architecture

### Components

| Component | Responsibility | Technology |
|-----------|---------------|------------|
| API Layer | Request handling | FastAPI / Express |
| Database  | Data persistence | PostgreSQL |
| Frontend  | User interface | React / Vue |

### Data Flow

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  Client --> API --> DB[(Database)]
  DB --> API --> Client
```

## API Reference

### Endpoint: `GET /items`

Returns a list of items.

**Parameters**

| Name   | Type   | Required | Description        |
|--------|--------|----------|--------------------|
| limit  | int    | No       | Max results (default: 20) |
| offset | int    | No       | Pagination offset  |

**Response**

```json
{
  "data": [],
  "total": 0,
  "page": 1
}
```

## Configuration

```yaml
# config.yaml
app:
  host: "0.0.0.0"
  port: 8080
  debug: false

database:
  url: "postgresql://user:pass@localhost:5432/db"
  pool_size: 10
```

::: {.callout-warning}
# Warning
Never commit secrets or credentials. Use environment variables or a secrets manager.
:::

## Development

### Running Tests

```bash
# Unit tests
npm test

# With coverage
npm run test:coverage
```

### Code Style

```bash
# Lint
npm run lint

# Format
npm run format
```

## Deployment

::: {.callout-tip}
# Tip
Use CI/CD pipelines to automate deployment. See `.github/workflows/` for pipeline definitions.
:::

```bash
# Build production artifact
npm run build

# Docker
docker build -t app:latest .
docker run -p 8080:8080 app:latest
```

## Changelog

| Version | Date       | Notes               |
|---------|------------|---------------------|
| 1.0.0   | 2026-04-21 | Initial release     |

## References

- [Quarto Documentation](https://quarto.org/docs/)
- [Project Repository](#)
- [Issue Tracker](#)
